title: FlashPlus
description: An addon for Flashback to help VFX piplines
body:
Flashback Addon to add VFX processing stuff + other features on request.

**IF YOU HAVE THIS MOD INSTALLED, DO NOT REPORT ISSUES TO MOULBERRY (flashback developer)**

Basic Tutorial:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HtCk7lwAgBk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Showcase Reel (All made with FlashPlus):
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NePRDbeOILg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Current features
- Entity Tracking
- Camera Path Exporting (Including FOV Keyframes)
- Panorama Export (for HDRIs)

Planned but not implemented yet:
- Depth Map exporting
- World Exporting

To import into Blender you will need an addon:
https://github.com/FalseMSP/RedsFlashbackImporter

Explanation of what the mod does.
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/Li5Q1k-nRQU
